sections.title: Talking to Wyson with mole parts in inventory

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: If I'm not mistaken, you've got some body parts from a big mole there! I'll trade it for bird nests if ye likes. Or was ye wantin' some woad leaves instead?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I will trade the mole parts.

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: I'm the head gardener around here. If you're looking for woad leaves, or if you need help with owt, I'm yer man.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please, I need woad leaves.

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: How much are you willing to pay?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about 5 coins?

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: No no, that's far too little. Woad leaves are hard to get. I used to have plenty but someone kept stealing them off me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about 10 coins?

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: No no, that's far too little. Woad leaves are hard to get. I used to have plenty but someone kept stealing them off me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about 15 coins?

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: Mmmm... okay, that sounds fair.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have enough coins to buy the leaves. I'll come back later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: I'll be around if you have any more gardening needs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about 20 coins?

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: Okay, that's more than fair.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have enough coins to buy the leaves. I'll come back later.

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: Here, have two, you're a generous person.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about ME helping YOU instead?

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: That's a nice thing to say. I do need a hand, now you mention it. You see, there's some stupid mole digging up my lovely garden.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A mole? Surely you've dealt with moles in the past?

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: Ah, well this is no ordinary mole! He's a big'un for sure. Ya see... I'm always relied upon to make the most of this 'ere garden - the faster and bigger I can grow plants the better!

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: In my quest for perfection I looked into 'Malignius-Mortifer's-Super-Ultra-Flora-Growth-Potion'. It worked well on my plants, no doubt about it! But it had the same effect on a nearby mole. Ya can imagine the

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: havoc he causes to my patches of sunflowers! Why, if any of the other gardeners knew about this mole, I'd be looking for a new job in no time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. What do you need me to do?

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: If ya are willing maybe yer wouldn't mind killing it for me? Take a spade and use it to shake up them mole hills. Be careful though, he really is big!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything in this for me?

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: Well, if yer gets any mole skin or mole claws off 'un, I'd trade 'em for bird nests if ye brings 'em here to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, I'll bear it in mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, but I'm not interested.

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know much about these shoes?

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: Those look like my friend Tiffy's armour.

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: If you had mole slippers, I reckon I could combine 'em.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know much about these shoes?

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: Well, those look like very unusual moles indeed. Little 'uns.

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: If you had holy sandals, I reckon I could combine 'em.

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: Woops I can't do this right now. Come back in an hour.

lines.speaker: Wyson the gardener
lines.text: Here, have this.
